description: Synthetic scale-bucket task templates. Planner.generate_quota_fill instantiates one task per template when the live queue's scale ratio drops below 70%. Each new task's id = id_prefix + UTC date suffix, so the same template can replenish the queue at most once per day. Keep templates risk=low and whitelisted to paths inside smedjan/ or the agentindex static-render layer — they are auto-approved by the factory.

schema.id_prefix: string, unique base for generated task ids
schema.title: string
